title: phaseolus coccineus subsp. striatus
intro: Phaseolus coccineus subsp. striatus, also known as the scarlet runner bean or red runner bean, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is known for its rich medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
